elements.label: text

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Eligible property
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Appraisal requirements
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Eligible property
elements.label: text

elements.text: A Home Possible® Mortgage must be secured by a 1- to 4-unit Primary Residence.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Home Possible Mortgages secured by Manufactured Homes must comply with all
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements of Chapter 5703 and this chapter.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages secured by a CHOICEHome® Manufactured Home must comply with the
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements of Section 5703.12 and this chapter.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Home Possible Mortgages may be secured by a Cooperative Unit if permitted under the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller’s Purchase Documents and must comply with the requirements of Chapter 5705.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Appraisal requirements
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller must obtain an appraisal that meets the property eligibility and appraisal
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements of Topic 5600 unless the Last Feedback Certificate includes an automated
elements.label: text

elements.text: collateral evaluation (ACE) offer stating that the Mortgage is eligible for collateral
elements.label: text

elements.text: representation and warranty relief with ACE or ACE+ PDR and the Seller has accepted the
elements.label: text

elements.text: offer.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: See Section 5602.3 for more information on ACE or Section 5602.4 for ACE+ PDR.
elements.label: text

elements.text: 4501.4: Eligible Borrowers for Home Possible®
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: Mortgages (02/04/26)
elements.label: text

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Income limits
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Occupancy
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Ownership of other property
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Income limits
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Borrower’s qualifying income, converted to an annual basis, must not exceed 80% of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Area Median Income for the location of the Mortgaged Premises.
elements.label: text

elements.text: To determine whether the Borrower’s income exceeds the income limits, the Seller must rely
elements.label: text

elements.text: on the income used to qualify the Borrower.
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ For Loan Product Advisor® Mortgages, Loan Product Advisor will determine the income
elements.label: text

elements.text: eligibility of the Mortgage
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ For Non-Loan Product Advisor Mortgages, the Seller must use the Home Possible®
elements.label: text

elements.text: Income & Property Eligibility tool. The Seller may not use other published Area
elements.label: text

elements.text: Median Income versions (such as those posted on
elements.label: text

elements.text: https://www.huduser.gov/portal/home.html) to determine Mortgage or product
elements.label: text

elements.text: eligibility.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Occupancy
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Occupancy requirement
elements.label: text

elements.text: At least one Borrower must occupy the property secured by a Home Possible Mortgage
elements.label: text

elements.text: as their Primary Residence.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Requirements for Mortgages with non-occupying Borrowers
elements.label: text

elements.text: Non-occupying Borrowers are permitted, provided that:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Mortgage is secured by a 1-unit property
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The loan-to-value (LTV), total LTV (TLTV), and Home Equity Line of Credit
elements.label: text

elements.text: (HELOC) TLTV ratios must not exceed:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ 95% for Loan Product Advisor Accept Mortgages, except that for fixed-rate
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages with Affordable Seconds®, the TLTV ratio must not exceed 105%
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ 90% for Manually Underwritten Mortgages, except that for fixed-rate Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: with Affordable Seconds, the TLTV ratio must not exceed 105%
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ For Manually Underwritten Mortgages, the occupant Borrower’s:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Monthly housing expense-to-income ratio should not exceed 35%; and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Monthly debt payment-to-income (DTI) ratio must not exceed 43%
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: Funds used to qualify for the Mortgage may come from the occupying and/or the
elements.label: text

elements.text: non-occupying Borrower.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Ownership of other property
elements.label: text

elements.text: The occupying Borrower(s) must not have an ownership interest in more than two financed
elements.label: text

elements.text: residential properties, including the subject property, as of the Note Date, or the Effective
elements.label: text

elements.text: Date of Permanent Financing for Construction to Permanent Mortgages and Renovation
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages.
elements.label: text

elements.text: 4501.5: Underwriting requirements for Home Possible®
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: Mortgages (04/12/26)
elements.label: text

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Loan Product Advisor®
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Manually Underwritten Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: A Home Possible® Mortgage may be submitted to Loan Product Advisor or may be a Manually
elements.label: text

elements.text: Underwritten Mortgage, except as otherwise stated below.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Loan Product Advisor
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Borrower’s credit reputation is acceptable if the Mortgage is submitted to Loan Product
elements.label: text

elements.text: Advisor in accordance with Chapter 5101 and receives a Risk Class of Accept.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Manually Underwritten Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: Manually Underwritten Mortgages must meet the requirements of this chapter and
elements.label: text

elements.text: Topics 5100 through 5500.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Each Borrower individually, and all Borrowers collectively, must have an acceptable credit
elements.label: text

elements.text: reputation as described in Topics 5100 and 5200.
elements.label: text

elements.text: An individual Borrower with insufficient credit history for whom the Seller cannot
elements.label: text

elements.text: document a credit reputation because the Borrower does not have sufficient credit history, is
elements.label: text

elements.text: considered to have an acceptable credit reputation provided that:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Borrower has no evidence of any derogatory credit, such as a lien, judgment or
elements.label: text

elements.text: collection, paid or unpaid, reflected on the credit report or elsewhere in the Mortgage file,
elements.label: text

elements.text: and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ At least one other Borrower whose income and assets are used for qualification has an
elements.label: text

elements.text: acceptable credit reputation as described in Topics 5100 and 5200
elements.label: text

elements.text: For Manually Underwritten Mortgages, the minimum Indicator Scores are:
elements.label: text

elements.text: Property/Mortgage type Minimum Indicator Score
elements.label: text

elements.text: 1-unit fixed-rate Mortgages that are purchase
elements.label: text

elements.text: transactions (other than Manufactured Homes)
elements.label: text

elements.text: 1-unit ARMs
elements.label: text

elements.text: 1-unit Mortgages that are “no cash-out”
elements.label: text

elements.text: refinance transactions
elements.label: text

elements.text: 2- to 4-unit properties 700
elements.label: text

elements.text: Manufactured Homes 680
elements.label: text

elements.text: Exception: When none of the Borrowers has a usable Credit Score, a minimum
elements.label: text

elements.text: Indicator Score is not required if:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The requirements of Chapter 5202 are met;
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The loan-to-value (LTV), total LTV (TLTV) and Home Equity Line of Credit
elements.label: text

elements.text: (HELOC) TLTV ratios are less than or equal to 95%;
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Mortgage is not secured by a Manufactured Home; and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Each Borrower’s credit history for the most recent 24 months shows:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ No unpaid judgments, tax liens or collections
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ No payments 60 days or more past due
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ No more than two payments 30 days past due
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ No housing payments past due
elements.label: text

elements.text: 4501.6: Borrower income and qualifying ratios for
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: Home Possible® Mortgages (04/12/26)
elements.label: text

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Qualifying income
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Rental income
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Contribution to total qualifying income from Borrowers with insufficient credit history
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Qualifying ratios
elements.label: text

elements.text: Home Possible® Mortgages must comply with the requirements of Topics 5300 and 5400 and the
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements of this section. In the event of a conflict, the Seller must comply with the
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements of this section.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Qualifying income
elements.label: text

elements.text: In determining the Borrower’s qualifying income in accordance with Topic 5300, the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Borrowers base earnings must be considered for both non-fluctuating and fluctuating
elements.label: text

elements.text: employment earnings before any additional employment earnings (e.g., bonus, commission,
elements.label: text

elements.text: overtime, tips) may be considered.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Rental income
elements.label: text

elements.text: When determining the stable monthly income (as described in Section 5301.1), rental income
elements.label: text

elements.text: may be considered if generated from:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ A 1-unit Primary Residence if the rental income requirements in Section 5306.1(h) are
elements.label: text

elements.text: met
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ A 1-unit Primary Residence if the following requirements are met in lieu of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements in Section 5306.1(h):
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ The person providing the rental income:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Must not be obligated on the Mortgage and must not have an ownership interest in
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Mortgaged Premises
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Must have resided with the Borrower for at least one year
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Will continue residing with the Borrower in the new residence
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Must provide appropriate documentation to evidence residency with the Borrower
elements.label: text

elements.text: (e.g., driver’s license, bill, bank statement, etc., showing their address matches the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Borrower’s address)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Cannot be the Borrower’s spouse or domestic partner
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Rental income from the person residing in the Mortgaged Premises:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Must have been paid to the Borrower for the past 12 months
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Can be verified through evidence showing receipt of regular payments of rental
elements.label: text

elements.text: income to the Borrower for at least nine of the past 12 months (e.g., copies of
elements.label: text

elements.text: canceled checks)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Must be averaged over 12 months for qualifying purposes if fewer than 12 months
elements.label: text

elements.text: of payments are documented
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Cannot exceed 30% of total income used to qualify for the Mortgage
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ The Mortgage file must contain a written statement in the form of a signed letter or e￾mail directly from the Borrower affirming:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The source of the rental income
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The fact that the person providing the rental income has resided with the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Borrower for the past year and intends to continue residing with the Borrower in
elements.label: text

elements.text: the new residence for the foreseeable future
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ An ADU on a subject 1-unit Primary Residence if the rental income requirements in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 5306.1(g) are met
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ A live-in aide residing in a 1-unit Primary Residence if the rental income requirements in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 5306.1(h) are met
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ A subject 2- to 4-unit Primary Residence if the rental income requirements in Section
elements.label: text

elements.text: 5306.1(e) are met
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ A non-subject investment property if the rental income requirements in Section 5306.1(c)
elements.label: text

elements.text: are met
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Contribution to total qualifying income from Borrowers with insufficient credit history
elements.label: text

elements.text: For Manually Underwritten Mortgages, the Seller may consider as qualifying income, the
elements.label: text

elements.text: income contributed by a Borrower with insufficient credit history, as described in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 4501.5(b), provided the amount contributed by the Borrower with insufficient credit
elements.label: text

elements.text: history is not more than 30% of the total qualifying income.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (d) Qualifying ratios
elements.label: text

elements.text: There is no maximum monthly housing expense-to-income ratio.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Debt payment-to-income ratios must not exceed the following limits:
elements.label: text

elements.text: Underwriting path Home Possible Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: Loan Product Advisor Mortgages Determined by Loan Product Advisor
elements.label: text

elements.text: Manually Underwritten Mortgages 45%
